name: BuildNum
description: Finds BuildNum.xml, reads BuildNum element, provides $(BuildNum) variable
helpMarkDown: Searches recursively for `BuildNum.xml` under `Build.SourcesDirectory`, then exposes its `<BuildNum>` element value as the pipeline variable `BuildNum`.
author: JJ van Zon

outputVariables.name: BuildNum
outputVariables.description: Value of the BuildNum element read from  BuildNum.xml.
